file_summary: This appears to be a comprehensive codebase index file for a code search/analysis system. It contains project documentation (AGENTS.md, PRD.md), backend FastAPI application with health and repository APIs, core chunking and indexing logic for code documents, repository import/ingestion functionality, project metadata management, and frontend documentation. The system is designed to load, index, and search code repositories with structured request/response models and error handling.

line_windows.summary: Contains project rules (AGENTS.md), backend package initialization, health API, repo API with request/response models and endpoints for loading, indexing, and searching repositories, main FastAPI app, settings configuration, and core module exports.

Contains core chunking logic (CodeChunk class, chunk_documents, _chunk_python_document, _chunk_whole_document), indexing logic (SearchResult class, build_and_save_index, search_index, helper functions), and repo import classes (ScannedFile, ProjectMetadata).

Contains indexing helper functions, repo import functions (scan_repository_files, save_project_metadata), repo ingestion module (RepoDocument, IngestionError, IngestionResult, RepoIngestor), tests for repo ingestion, project metadata JSON files, and documentation files (PRD.md, task.json).
Contains the continuation of documentation files (PRD.md, task.json) and the frontend README.
